title.en: China-to-Bhutan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入不丹：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入不丹：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Bhutan BSB, BEA, and BPC requirements, IEC-aligned inverter safety, anti-islanding and grid-connection evidence, EMC expectations, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, high-altitude derating, and hydro-dominant India-interconnected grid context - versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与不丹BSB、BEA和BPC要求、IEC取向的逆变器安全、防孤岛及并网证据、EMC要求、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、高海拔降额，以及以水电为主并与印度互联的电网背景——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與不丹BSB、BEA和BPC要求、IEC取向的逆變器安全、防孤島及併網證據、EMC要求、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、高海拔降額，以及以水電為主並與印度互聯的電網背景——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSB standards adoption determination, BEA regulatory approval, BPC grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Bhutan Standards Bureau standards, Bhutan Electricity Authority rules, Bhutan Power Corporation grid-connection conditions, project-owner requirements, and site altitude conditions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSB标准采纳裁定、BEA监管批准、BPC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行不丹标准局标准、不丹电力管理局规则、不丹电力公司并网条件、项目业主要求及现场海拔条件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSB標準採納裁定、BEA監管批准、BPC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行不丹標準局標準、不丹電力管理局規則、不丹電力公司併網條件、項目業主要求及現場海拔條件。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Bhutan, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming the current Bhutan Standards Bureau adoption of IEC-based inverter standards; (2) obtaining IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (3) documenting IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface and anti-islanding evidence acceptable to the Bhutan Electricity Authority, Bhutan Power Corporation, and project owner; (4) providing IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; (5) validating firmware for Bhutan's 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V grid. Bhutan uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but its nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V; Chinese GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence is not automatically accepted. High-altitude thermal and power derating should be checked for Himalayan sites.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口不丹时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认不丹标准局现行采纳的IEC取向逆变器标准；（2）取得IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（3）准备不丹电力管理局、不丹电力公司及项目业主可接受的IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口及防孤岛证据；（4）提供IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（5）按不丹50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V电网验证固件。不丹与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V；中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据不会被自动接受。喜马拉雅高海拔场址还应核查热设计和功率降额。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口不丹時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認不丹標準局現行採納的IEC取向逆變器標準；（2）取得IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（3）準備不丹電力管理局、不丹電力公司及項目業主可接受的IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面及防孤島證據；（4）提供IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（5）按不丹50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V電網驗證韌體。不丹與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V；中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據不會被自動接受。喜馬拉雅高海拔場址還應核查熱設計和功率降額。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
